description: SCOR Attack Paths. Library of converged cross-domain attack paths classified by the METEORSTORM five-layer data model. Each entry is an Attack Path analytic element (AN:ATT:Attack Path:NN) whose TOE (Target of Exploitation) field enumerates the structural ETENs (PCE/SEG/SVC/AST) that the path touches. Tabs are PCE environments (Terrestrial, Aquatic, Aerial, Orbital, Deep Space); columns are the five METEORSTORM exposure domains (Cyber, Radio Frequency, Kinetic, Supply Chain, Environmental). A path that spans multiple environments or exposure domains receives multiple kill_chain entries and renders in every applicable cell. Pairs with the METEORSTORM MISP taxonomy at https://github.com/MISP/misp-taxonomies/tree/main/meteorstorm. Contact: william.o.ferguson@ethicallyhacking.space. License: CC BY 4.0. Namespace_display: SCOR. Namespace_long: Space, Cybersecurity, Operations, and Resilience. Steward: H4CK32N4U75®.
name: SCOR Attack Paths
